conversations.content: Let's do some physics exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.

Please calculate using the previously mentioned special rules of the Azeroth world: An object with mass m=5kg is located at a height h=10m, gravitational acceleration g=10m/s², what is its gravitational potential energy E?

<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The previously mentioned special rules of the Azeroth world, given mass m, height h, and gravitational acceleration g, find gravitational potential energy E</content>
Related memory fragments: None. Low related memory fragments: None.

conversations.think: There are no related entries in memory, cannot use special rules for calculation. Here we use the conventional formula, E = mgh, substituting the values: E = 5 × 10 × 10 = 500 J.
conversations.content: Sorry, I did not recall the calculation method for gravitational potential energy under the Azeroth special rules. Under the conventional method, E = mgh = 5 × 10 × 10 = 500 J.
It's okay, this problem indeed did not mention any special rules.
Okay, I will continue to work hard to memorize each special rule.
